opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Rescued my ruined $900 sofa for just $52 — pet hair gone in 10 min
opportunities.before_state: Shredded, stained sofa covered in pet hair and claw marks, embarrassing to have guests over
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean sofa with a tailored look — waterproof, machine washable, pets can't ruin it
buyer_intent_keywords: couch cover that stays in place
opportunities.why_now: Spring pet-shedding season peaks in May, driving a surge in searches for pet-proof furniture solutions.

opportunities.specific_product: Clear stackable pantry bin set with labels
opportunities.transformation_hook: Transformed my chaotic pantry for $38 — found food I forgot I had
opportunities.before_state: Overflowing pantry shelves with falling bags, expired food hidden in back, zero visibility
opportunities.after_state: Color-coded, labeled, stackable bins with full visibility — every item has a home
opportunities.why_now: Late-spring pantry resets trend annually as households do warm-weather deep cleans and summer meal-prep kicks in.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia herb scissors and kitchen gadget set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Upgraded my entire kitchen prep for $29 — cut cooking time in half
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered drawer of dull, mismatched tools slowing down every meal prep session
opportunities.after_state: Streamlined, professional-grade tools that make chopping, straining, and measuring effortless
opportunities.why_now: Summer grilling and fresh herb season boosts kitchen tool searches; Syruvia's 20% commission makes this a high-value conversion target.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products velvet accent chair with gold legs
opportunities.transformation_hook: One chair turned my sad corner into a designer bedroom for $169
opportunities.before_state: Empty, wasted bedroom corner with nothing but a pile of clothes and a floor lamp
opportunities.after_state: Styled reading nook with velvet chair, cozy throw, and purposeful layout that looks magazine-worthy
opportunities.why_now: Bedroom refresh content dominates Reels in spring as renters redecorate; higher ticket price drives strong absolute commission at 15%.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm adjustable side sleeper pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Fixed 3 years of neck pain for $79 — first full night's sleep in months
opportunities.before_state: Flat, misshapen pillow causing neck stiffness, shoulder pain, and waking up exhausted every morning
opportunities.after_state: Customizable fill pillow perfectly contoured for side sleepers — zero neck pain, full REM sleep
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content sustains high engagement year-round; Eli & Elm's 20% commission on a $79 price point yields strong revenue per conversion.
